zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Dampierre I於1227年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布達皮時，他的父親Guillaume de Dampierre II31歲，母親Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre25歲。他於1250年3月9日與Laure de Lorraine結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1253年登記服兵役。他去世於1258年在他的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Dampierre I于1227年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布達皮时，他的父亲Guillaume de Dampierre II31岁，母亲Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre25岁。他于1250年3月9日与Laure de Lorraine结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1253年登记服兵役。他去世于1258年在他的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Dampierre I was born in 1227, in Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Guillaume de Dampierre II, was 31 and his mother, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, was 25. He married Laure de Lorraine on 9 March 1250. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1253. He died in 1258, in his hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Dampierre I est né en 1227, à Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guillaume de Dampierre II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Laure de Lorraine le 9 mars 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1253. Il est décédé en 1258, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Dampierre I 1227 in Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Dampierre II 31 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre 25. Er hat am 9. März 1250 Laure de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1253 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Dampierre I è nato il nel 1227 nel Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Dampierre II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Laure de Lorraine il 9 marzo 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1253. Morì nel 1258, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Dampierre Iが1227年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベダンパエアで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Dampierre IIは31歳，母Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandreは25歳であった。1250年3月9日にLaure de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1253年に兵役登録をした。彼は1258年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Dampierre I(이)가 1227년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 댐피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Dampierre II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1250년 3월 9일 Laure de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1258년 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Dampierre I nasceu em 1227, em Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Dampierre II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Laure de Lorraine em 9 de março de 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1253. Ele faleceu em 1258, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Dampierre I родился в 1227 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Dampierre II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Laure de Lorraine 9 марта 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1253 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1258 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Dampierre I nació en 1227, en Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Dampierre II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Laure de Lorraine el 9 de marzo de 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1253. Murió en 1258, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.
